language_lock.rule: All creative content, including descriptions, dialogue, and intro text, must be in Simplified Chinese.

process_over_label.rule: Prefer process descriptions over static labels.
process_over_label.acceptance: She treats direct eye contact as sensory overload, which triggers a flight response.

format_safety.rule: Do not wrap XML file contents in Markdown code fences.
In Module B scenario files, wrap scenario_engine using XML comments.
Use block comments only for inline notes inside scenario_engine when the template requires it.

anti_ai_flavor_rules.overview: When writing Chinese narrative text inside XML tags such as intro, description, and dialogue samples in dialogue_variance, write like a human novelist rather than a system designer.
anti_ai_flavor_rules.boundary: XML tag names such as cognitive_stack and perception_matrix may remain technical. The Chinese prose inside those tags must still read like natural fiction.

example_pair.bad: 她的认知系统开始处理周围的环境数据...
example_pair.good: 她下意识地打量着四周，目光在每一个角落停留片刻...
